subject: API returning 500 errors
body: We are getting intermittent 500 errors on the completions endpoint since this morning. Affected request IDs: req-a1b2c3, req-d4e5f6. Our production pipeline is blocked.

subject: Billing discrepancy on March invoice
body: Our invoice shows $450 but based on our usage dashboard we expected approximately $50. Can you provide a detailed usage breakdown for the billing period?

subject: Cannot access admin dashboard after password reset
body: After completing the password reset flow I can no longer log into the admin dashboard. Browser shows a 403 Forbidden error. Tried clearing cookies and using incognito mode.

subject: Feature request: webhook notifications
body: Would love webhook support for async job completion notifications. Currently we poll the status endpoint every 30 seconds which adds unnecessary API calls and latency.

subject: Safety filter false positive on medical content
body: Our healthcare application is getting blocked by the content safety filter when processing legitimate medical terminology. This is affecting patient-facing summaries.
